## Conference
- Deepika B V, (2013), Spatial Decision Support System for Solid Waste Management in Chickmaglur City, NCEEM-2013, Bantakal Udupi, 18th and 19th October 2013
- Deepika B V1, C R Ramakrishnaiah2 and G Ranganna3(2018), “ASSESSMENT OF GROUND WATER QUALITY INDEX: A CASE STUDY IN UDUPI, KARNATAKA, INDIA “, National conference  on civil Engineering and Sustainable Urban Development (NCCESUD- 2018), feb 2018, Patna.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
- Attended a workshop on “Personality Development” by B D Sharma at AIT, Chikmagalur
- Attended a workshop on ” Research Methodologies and Latex ” fo three days organised by VTU e-learning centre, Mysore from 19th to 21st july 2016 at Mangalore Institute of Technology and Engineering, Moodabidri
- Attended a ISTE-SRM short term training programme on “Water Management organised by Dr. M V Shetty Institute of Technology and sponsored by Indian Society for technical Education, New Delhi and SRM University, Chennai, during 21-072014 to 26-07-2014
- I have undergone a 6 days of intensive training on counselling skills held at SMVITM from 04-12-2017 to 09-12-2017 in association with Alva’s counselling Centre, Moodabidri
- I have undergone a 3 days of intensive training on counselling skills held at Baliga hospital Udupi in 2015
- Attended a three day faculty development program on “Enhancing Teaching Methodology” held at SMVITM, Bantakal from 13th o 15th December 2017
- Attended a one day Faculty Development program on “LEAD-Leadership Empowerment and Development” organised by the ISTE faculty Chapter of SMVITM on 24th January 2018
- Participated in Three days faculty Development program on “Water resources, Geo- Environmental Challenges and its application ” (WRGECA-2018) held at SMVITM from 12th to 14th june 2018
- Attended a National level FDP on “Decoding Examination During and Post COVID 19” 0n 8h may, 2020 organised by skillslate and powered by Zovy Studios, Pune
- Attended a three days of online FDP on “Importance of water, Sanitation, Health and Waste Management during Epidemics” from 27-05-2020 to 29-05-2020 organised by Jain College of Engineering, Belagavi.
- Participated in virtual workshop on “Effective online Engineering Education : Tips & Tricks 0n 26th April, 2020 organised by IEEE bangalore section
- Participated in 5 day FDP on “Empowering Teaching Skills” held at SMVITM from 27th to 31s January 2020
- Attended  5 days full-time training workshop entitled “Student Mental Health Promotion” conducted by the Depatment of Clinical Psychology, NIMHANS, Bangalore from 3rd to 7h feb 2020

## Ms. AURIN MADTHA
- Ph.D (Pursuing)
- MBA (Human Resource Management)
- UGC - NET in Management

## Conference
 Won BEST PAPER AWARD in the international conference on “Sustainable Business Practices: Issues, Challenges and Prospects” organized by St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) College, Mangalore.
 Paper published titled “A Study On Competency of Branch Managers of South Canara District Central Co-Operative (SCDCC) Banks in Dakshina Kannada District.” in business research conference organized by Don Bosco Institute of Management Studies, Bangalore.
 Presented research paper in an International Conference on ‘Transform & Thrive in an Agile World’ held at St. Aloysius College (AIMIT), Mangalore.
 Presented research paper entitled “Green Human Resource Management” in an International Conference On Banking, Finance & Accounting held at St. Paul’s College, Kalamasserry, Kerala.
 Presented and published research paper entitled “Awareness & Usage of Electronic Banking Services Among Graduate Students of Udupi” in a National Level Seminar on ‘Role of Digital Banking in Economic Development’ held at Nehru Memorial College, Sullia Karnataka.
 Presented a seminar on the topic “Transforming Our World with Global Goals: From The Perspective of Emerging Economies” in a National Seminar organized by Guru Nanak College, Chennai in association with Sustainable Development Goals Cell.
Presented a paper titled “Green Policies in Indian Higher Education Institutions” in the International Conference on ‘Industry and Innovation – Building Resilient Leadership for Inclusive and Sustainable Development’ organized by School of Commerce, Finance & Accountancy in collaboration with International Skill Development Corporation held at St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) Mangalore on 12 th Feb 2025.
Presented a paper titled “Going Green, Feeling Good: Predictors of Eco-behavior and Well-being at Work” in the International Conference on ‘Novation 2025’ organized by School of Business and Management held at St. Aloysius (Deemed to be University) Mangalore on 25 th April 2025.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
Participated in the International Workshop on “Research Article Writing with AI tools and Publication Ethics” on 8 th & 9 th April 2025.
Participated in 5 days National FDP, “Beyond the Basics: Advanced Research Methodologies for the Modern Scholars” organized by Srinivas Institute of Technology, Mangalore from May 12 th to 16 th , 2025.

## Ms. MELANIE PIUS DSOUZA
- Ph.D (Pursuing) from Manipal Academy of Higher Education, MAHE, Manipal
- M. Com. (Management) from University of Mumbai
- B. Com. from University of Mumbai (Narsee Monjee College of Commerce and Economics)
- UGC NET-JRF in Commerce
- Best 5-minute thesis presentation award among all disciplines at the Mandatory PhD presentations at Manipal Research Colloquium 2025 held at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal. Also, awarded the best poster under the Humanities category.
- Awarded Best Research Paper at the International Multidisciplinary Conference (2024), organised by HR College of Commerce and Economics, HSNC University, Mumbai.
- Awarded Junior Research Fellowship (99.9465069 total percentile - All India Rank 20) by University Grants Commission (UGC), Government of India.
- Awarded Dr. TMA Pai Scholarship by Manipal Academy of Higher Education, MAHE, Manipal.
- Awarded the Ajit Datar Memorial Scholarship (for outstanding student organiser) by Narsee Monjee College of Commerce and Economics (NM College), Mumbai.
- Awarded for outstanding leadership at the National Service Scheme (NSS) wing of NM College, Mumbai.
- Awarded Best Student in display of moral and ethical values by St. Louis Convent High School, Mumbai.
- Youth Flourishing
- Positive Design
- Training in Human Skills
- Interdisciplinary Studies

## Professional Services and Contributions
- Delivered an invited talk on the topic ‘Gen Z: Insights for educators’ as part of the capacity building programme for the teaching staff of St. Aloysius (Deemed-to-be) University, Mangaluru on June 11, 2025.
- Invited as a resource person by the Indian Society for Training and Development (ISTD), Mangalore-Udupi Chapter, for their conference titled ‘HR Alchemy- A Conference on Learning and Development’ on March 22, 2025. Session Title: ‘Gen Z and Beyond – Insights for Mentors, Trainers and Counsellors,’ delivered to professionals (industry and academia).
- Resource person for a session on ‘Literature Review and Finding the Gap’ organised by the Department of Social and Health Innovation (DSHI), Prasanna School of Public Health (PSPH), MAHE, Manipal, on May 3, 2025.
- Facilitator for a workshop on ‘Self-awareness’ for M.Sc. Health Economics students at Manipal School of Commerce and Economics, MAHE, Manipal on Sept 4, 2024.
- Resource person on ‘Social awareness’ for ‘Pragathi’, a skill development program for undergraduate students on July 25-26, 2024, organised by St. Aloysius (Deemed-to-be) University, Mangaluru.
- Guest speaker for an online seminar on ‘Research Publication and Ethics’ for research scholars and faculty members from the Department of Management Studies, NITTE, Mangaluru, on December 7, 2023.
- Guest speaker for an online seminar on ‘Review of the Literature’ for MBA students at A J Institute of Management, Mangaluru, on October 5, 2023.
- Facilitator at a national-level experiential workshop on ‘Qualitative Data Analysis’ to research scholars and faculty members at Manel Srinivas Nayak Institute of Management (MSNIM), Besant Campus, Mangaluru, on March 29, 2023.
- Invited to administer short music-based mindfulness interventions to SBI life insurance agents at Udupi on December 10, 2022.

## Journals
- Ghosh, T., Kumra, R., Dsouza, M.P ., Mitrega, M., Spáčil, V. and Pfajfar, G. (2025). International marketing strategies leveraging country-of-origin effects in luxury market: a systematic review and research agenda. International Marketing Review, pp.1–41. Scopus quartile: Q1, Citescore: 9.9; Impact factor: 4.6 (JIF); 6.2 (5-year JIF); ABDC: A https://doi.org/10.1108/imr-01-2025-0016
- Dsouza MP , Shetty A, TS S, Damodar P, Albuquerque Pai A, Mathias RJ, et al. “I would want to listen to it as a medicine” – Lo-fi music and state anxiety, a mixed-methods pilot study on young adults. International Journal of Adolescence and Youth. 2024 Sep 4;29(1). Scopus quartile: Q1, Citescore: 8.8; Impact factor: 1.9 (JIF); 3.8 (5-year JIF). https://doi.org/10.1080/02673843.2024.2388787
- Dsouza MP , Shetty A, D’Souza SE, Buthello E, Gudi N. Vibing the Young Consumer to Wellness: Exploring Lo-Fi Music Consumption Through the Positive Design Lens. SAGE Open. 2025 Jan 1;15(1). Scopus quartile: Q1,Citescore: 3.4; Impact factor: 2.0 (JIF); 2.3 (5-year JIF) https://doi.org/10.1177/21582440251318806
- Damodar P, Shetty A, Dsouza MP , Prakash A, Gudi N. Crafting careers through theory-driven interventions: a scoping review of the utility of social cognitive career theory and career maturity inventory. International Journal of Adolescence and Youth. 2024 Feb 11;29(1). Scopus-indexed Q1. https://doi.org/10.1080/02673843.2024.2308081
- Albuquerque-Pai A, Dsouza MP , Andrews TJJ, Sebastin KV, Ashok L. Defining e-research in social work: a review of strategies and challenges. China Journal of Social Work. 2023 May 4;16(2):137–65. Scopus-indexed Q2. https://doi.org/10.1080/17525098.2023.2232821
- Dsouza MP , Shetty A, Dinesh TK, Damodar P. Stimulating employee performance and well-being: a review of mindfulness impact in the hospitality sector. IIMBG Journal of Sustainable Business and Innovation. 2023 Oct 31;1(1). In the process of being Scopus-indexed. https://doi.org/10.1108/IJSBI-06-2023-0037

## Conference
- ‘A Global Perspective on Lo-Fi Music Consumption: Scoping Review of the Evidence’ – presentation at the Interdisciplinary Conference on Healthcare and Technical Research (ICHTR) 2022, at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal.
- ‘Rhythmic Wellness: Unveiling the Power of Lo-Fi Music Consumption for Youth Flourishing’ – presentation at the International Conference on Management Research (ICMR) 2023, at DoMS, IIT Madras, Chennai (Nominated for Best Paper).
- ‘The Chill Pill: Can Lo-Fi Music Reduce Student State Anxiety? A Mixed Methods Investigation’ – presentation at the International Multidisciplinary Conference on Governance, Politics, Ethics: Review and Perspectives in Times of Transition (2024), at H. R. College, HSNC University, Mumbai (Awarded Best Paper).
- ‘Theoretical Underpinnings on Mindfulness of Employees in the Hospitality Sector – A Narrative Review of the Evidence’ presented at the International Research Conference on Mindfulness 2022 by IIM Bodh Gaya.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
- Attended 8-day National Workshop on “An Academic Toolkit: 40+ AI Tools for Teaching and Research” in August 2023, organised by Assumption College, Kerala, in association with Lore and Ed Research Associates.
- Participated in FDP on “Business Innovation” at Manipal School of Commerce and Economics, MAHE, Manipal in April 2023.
- Attended Summer School Program 2023 at Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal.
- Attended National Workshop on “Documentation and Preparedness for Accreditation” in March 2020 held at Rosary College, Goa, in association with Xavier Board of Higher Education.
- Participated in Workshop on “Quantifying Leadership Skills through Brain Research and Psychology” at SP Jain School of Global Management, Mumbai in November 2019.
- Participated in the 10-day Refresher Course in Commerce, Accountancy and Management organised by the University Grants Commission Human Resource Development Centre in October 2019.
- Participated in the one-month Orientation Programme organised by the University Grants Commission Human Resource Development Centre in March 2017.
- Attended FDP on “Train the Trainer” at IBS Business School, Mumbai in July 2015.

# Admission to the First Year B.E. programs at SMVITM can be obtained in any of the following modes.

## CET (KEA) Admission
Students seeking seats through the Government quota must appear for the Common Entrance Test (CET) conducted by the Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA).
KEA Code: E206
Visit KEA Website →

## COMED-K Admission
Candidates must appear for the Entrance Test conducted by COMED-K, with seat selection based on their allotment procedures.
COMED-K Code: E123
Visit COMED-K Website →

## Management Quota
Students seeking admission through the Management Quota should directly approach the college office and are required to write an entrance test conducted by the college.

# Eligibility Criteria
Candidates should have passed II PUC / 12th Std. / Equivalent Exam with English as one of the languages and obtained a minimum of 45% of marks in aggregate in Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry / Bio-Technology / Biology / Electronics / Computer.

# Lateral Entry (2nd Year)
Students with a three-year diploma in a respective specialization can join the second year BE course. They must apply for the “Diploma Common Entrance Test (DCET)” conducted by KEA and follow the seat allotment procedure.
Visit DCET Page on KEA Website →

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

- B.Sc. (Physics,Chemistry,Mathematics)
- M.Sc. (Mathematics)
- M.A.(Hindi)
- Received gold certificate for NPTEL course on “Interpersonal skills’ held on July-September (8 week course).
- Secured 5th Rank in B.Sc. 2002-Mangalore University
- Numerical Methods
- Linear algebra
- PDE & ODE

## Journals
1. Renita Sharon Moni s et.al, (2017), Supersonic flow analysis and evaluation of damping derivative,IOSR-JMCE , Vol.2, pp. 29-36.
2. Renita Sharon Monis et.al, (2017), Computation of Stiffness derivative for an unsteady delta wing with curved leading edges,International journal of Recent Research Aspects, Vol.4, Issue 4,pp.69-72.
3.Aysha Shabana, Renita Sharon Moni s,et.al,(2017), Estimation of stability derivative of an Oscillating cone in Hypersonic Flow,International journal of Recent Research Aspects, Vol.4, Issue 4,pp.46-52.
4.Aysha Shabana , Renita Sharon Mon is et.al, (2017), Pressure and its derivative with Respect To Piston Mach number for an Oscillating Cone,IOSR-JMCE , Vol.1, pp.74-78.
5.Aysha Shabana , Renita Sharon Monis et.al,Estimation of Stability Derivatives in Newtonian Limit for Oscillating Cone, International Conference on Aerospace & Mechanical Engineering, IOP Conf. Series Materials & Engineering. 370(2018)012061 doi:10.1088/1757-899X/370/1/012061.
6.Aysha Shabana , Renita Sharon Moni s et.al,Computation of Stability Derivatives of an oscillating cone for specific heat ratio=1.66, International Conference on Aerospace & Mechanical Engineering, IOP Conf. Series Materials & Engineering .370(2018)012061 doi:10.1088/1757-899X/370/1/012061.
7.Aysha Shabana , Renita Sharon Monis et.al,The Computation of Stiffness derivatives for an Ogive in the hypersonic flow, International journal of Mechanical & Production Engineering Research and Development (IJMPERD),ISSN(P):2249-6890:ISSN(E):2249-8001, Vol.8, Issue 5, Oct2018,173-184.
8.Aysha Shabana , Renita Sharon Mon is et.al,Effect of semi vertex angle on stability derivatives for an oscillating cone for constant value of specific heat ratio, International Journal of Engineering & Technology, 7(3.29), Sept 2018,386-390.
9. Renita Sharon Moni s et.al,An effect of sweep angle on roll damping derivative for a delta wing with curved leading edges in unsteady flow,International Journal of Mechanical and Production Engineering Research and Development (IJMPERD),ISSN(P): 2249-6890; ISSN(E): 2249-8001,Vol. 9, Issue 2, Apr 2019, 361-374.
10. Renita Sharon Moni s, Aysha Shabana, Asha Crasta, and S. A. Khan, “Effect of Sweep Angle and a Half Sine Wave on Roll Damping Derivative of a Delta Wing” International Journal of Recent Technology and Engineering (IJRTE) ISSN: 2277-3878, Volume-8, Issue-2S3, pp. 984-989, August 2019, DOI : 10.35940/ijrte.B1184.0782S319.
11. Renita S Monis , Asha Crasta and Khan S. A., “Estimation of Damping derivatives for delta wings in Hypersonic Flow for straight leading edge”, International Journal of Mechanical and Production Engineering Research and Development (IJMPERD),Vol.9,Issue No.5, Oct 2019, pp.255-264.
12. Renita S Monis , Asha Crasta, Mohammed Faheem and Khan S. A., “Analysis of Damping Derivatives for Delta Wings in Hypersonic Flow for curved Leading Edges with Full Sine Wave,” International Journal of Engineering and Advanced Technology(IJEAT), ISSN:2249-8958, Vol. 9, Issue No.1, October 2019, pp.5457-5466.
13. Renita S Monis , Asha Crasta and Khan S. A., “Estimation of  Hypersonic unsteady and quasi steady damping derivatives for delta wings at large incidence drives”, International Journal of Advanced Science and Technology (IJAST),Vol.29,Issue No.6, Jan2020,pp.6844-6863.
14. Renita S Monis , Asha Crasta and Khan S. A., “Analytical Estimation of Stability Derivatives of wing with curved leading edges at hypersonic Mach Number”, TEST engineering & Management, ISSN:0193-4120, Vol.83, April 2020,pp.13808-13819.
15. Renita S Monis , Asha Crasta and Khan S. A., “Recent assessment and analysis of  damping derivatives for delta wings in hypersonic flow for curved leading  edges with full sine wave”, Recent Developments in Engineering,Vol.5,Chapter 10. Print ISBN:978-81-947979-5-1,eBook ISBN:978-81-947979-6-8,September 2020,pp.135-156.
16. Renita S Monis , Asha Crasta , Khan S. A.ans et.al,Comparative Study of Quasi study and unsteady damping derivatives for delta wings in Hypersonic flow for half sine wave,Journal of Advanced Research in Fluid Mechanics and Thermal Sciences,92,Issue 1,January 2022,pp.1-8.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.National workshop on Analytical and Numerical solutions of Partial differential equations,NITK, , Surathkal,18 – 22 Dec 2017.
2.National workshop on Computer Applications based on Modern Algebra,MIT,Manipal,01 -04 July 2017.
3.National workshop on High Speed flows & DAQ,BIT,Mangalore,21 – 23April2017.
4.FDP on Research Methodology & enhancing teaching methodology, SMVITM,BANTAKAL,11 – 15 Dec 2017.
5.Workshop on Basics of Mat LAb and its application in engineering mathematics, held in St.Joseph Engineering college, vamanjoor , 17-18 Dec 2018.

- S. M. Hegde and Lolita Priya Castelino “ Achromatic number of some classes of digraphs ”, Discrete Mathematics, Algorithms and Applications , Vol. 16, No.7, October 2023, 2350090-1-13, ISSN(print): 1793-8309 | ISSN(online): 1793-8317, https://doi.org/10.1142/S1793830923500908 .
- Lolita Priya Castelino and Kavyalaxmi Upadhyaya “Harmonious coloring of some classes of directed trees”,  Proceedings of the Jangjeon Mathematical Society,  27 (2024), No. 4, pp. 623 – 628, ISSN: 1598-7264(Print), ISSN 2508-7916(Online) http://dx.doi.org/10.17777/pjms2024.27.4.623.

## Conference
PAPERS PRESENTED IN CONFERENCES
- National Conference on Discrete Mathematics and its Applications to Science and
Social Systems, held at Govinda Dasa College, Surathkal, Karnataka, India, 26-28
February, 2009. “Harmonious colorings of digraphs” .
- National Conference on recent Trends in Computational Sciences and Engineering
NCRTCSE-2011, held at KVG College of Engineering, Sullia, Karnataka, India, 12 th
February, 2011. ” Harmonious colorings of oriented paths and oriented cycles”.
- Academy of Discrete Mathematics and applications (ADMA), held NIT Calicut, Kerala, India, 09-11 June, 2011.”Some results on the achromatic number of digraphs.
- 23 rd International Conference of Forum for Interdisciplinary Mathematics (FIM) on Interdisciplinary Mathematical, Statistical and Computational Techniques held at National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Surathkal, 18-20 December 2014. “Set colorings of digraphs”.
- International Conference on Mathematical Computer Engineering (ICMCE-2018) organized by the Division of Mathematics, School of Advanced Sciences, VIT, Chennai, 23-24 November 2018. “Complete colorings of digraphs”.
- International Conference on Applied Mathematics & Civil Structures (ICAMCS 2021) organized by Sri Sivasubramaniya Nadar College of Engineering, Kalavakkam, Chennai, 12-13 February 2021. “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs”.
- International Conference on Graphs, Networks and Combinatorics (ICGNC 2023) organized by Department of Mathematics, Ramanujan College, University of Delhi, 10-12 January 2023. “Achromatic number of some classes of digraphs”.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
- 5 th International Workshop on Graph Labelings held at Kalasalingam University, Krishnankoil, Tamilnadu,India, 07-10 January 2009.
- UGC sponsored seminar on Graph Theory held at Mahatma Gandhi Memorial College, Udupi, Karnataka, India, 27-28 March 2009.
- Homi J.Bhabha birth Centenary Workshop on Introduction to Graph and Geometric Algorithms held at Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore, India, 15-18 July 2009.
- International Congress of Mathematician 2010, Hyderabad, India, 19-27 August 2010. (Travel and Registration sponsored by organizing Committee of ICM).
- International Conference on current trends in Graph Theory and Combinatorics, CUSAT, Cochin, India, 12-15 August 2010.
- Two days Workshop on Application of Mathematics in Science & Technology held at Alva’s Institute of Engineering & Technology, Moodbidri, DK, Karnataka, 20-21 January 2017.
- International Conference on Mathematical Computer Engineering held at VIT University, Chennai, 03-04 November 2017.
- Five days Faculty Development Program on “Research Methodology” and “Enhancing Teaching Methodology” held at SMVITM, Bantakal, 11-15 December 2017.
- One day Faculty Development Program on “L.E.A.D – Leadership Empowerment and Development” held at SMVITM, Bantakal, 24 th January 2018.
- Delivered an invited talk on “Applications of Graph Theory” at the Orientation Program for PU students at Poornaprajna PU College, Udupi on 04 September 2018.
- International Workshop on Optimization Algorithms, Graph Theory and Geometrical flows in Modern Computing – 2018 organized by the Division of Mathematics, School of Advanced Sciences, VIT, Chennai, 23-24 November 2018.
- Completed NPTEL-AICTE Faculty Development Programme 8 week course “Introduction to Abstract and Linear Algebra”.
- Short Term Training Programme through ICT Mode on “Problem Based Learning” organized by National Institute of Technical Teacher’s Training and Research, Kolkata from 11-15 February 2019.
- Completed NPTEL-AICTE Faculty Development Programme 4 week course “Body Language: Key to Professional Success”.
- Completed online workshop on Universal Human Values on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), 02-06 May 2020.
- Participated in 2 days international webinar on “Recent Research Topics in Graph Theory” organized by the PG & Research Department of Mathematics, MES Mampad College (Autonomous), 20-21 May 2020.
- Completed 5 days online international Faculty Development Programme on “Recent Trends in Applied Mathematics” organized by SNS College of Engineering, Coimbatore, 02-06 June 2020.
- Delivered an invited talk titled “Harmonious Colorings of Digraphs” and chaired a session in the International Conference on Graph Labeling and Applications ICGLA-2020 organized by Department of Mathematics, Goa University, Goa-India, during September 17-19, 2020.
- Participated in one-week online workshop on “Algebra and Optimization 2020” sponsored by TEQIP- 3rd Scheme in NIT –Nagaland, 23-27 November 2020.
- Completed the Part 1 of the online UHV Refresher 1 FDP organized by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), 30 November – 4 December, 2020.
- Participated and successfully completed one-week AICTE-VTU joint Teachers Training Programme on “An Overview of Teaching Techniques in Social Connect and Responsibilities” organized by VTU Human Resource Development Centre (VTU – HRDC), Centre for PG Studies, VIAT, Muddenahalli, 07 – 11 March, 2022.
- Participated and successfully completed one-week AICTE-VTU joint Teachers Training Programme on “An Overview of Teaching Techniques in Computational Fluid Dynamics” organized by VTU Human Resource Development Centre (VTU – HRDC), Centre for PG Studies, VIAT, Muddenahalli, 09 – 13 May, 2022.
- Participated in four days Online Faculty Development programme on “Ramanujan’s Contribution to Number Theory and its Applications”, organized by the Department of Basic Science, VCET, Puttur, in association with the Vision Group on Science and Technology (VGST), Karnataka Science and Technology Promotion Society (KSTePS), Bengaluru, 03 – 06 August 2022.
- Participated in one-week AICTE-VTU joint Teachers Training Programme on “Introduction to Python Programming & its Applications”, organized by VTU Human Resource Development Centre (VTU – HRDC), Centre for PG Studies, VIAT, Muddenahalli, 19 – 23 June, 2023.
- Completed NPTEL-AICTE Faculty Development Programme 12 weeks course “Educational Leadership” during July- October 2023.
- Participated in seven days Online Faculty Development programme on “Scientific Software”, organized by the Department of Mathematics, School of Basic Sciences, The Assam Kaziranga University, 12 – 18 July 2024.
- Participated in one week online Short Term Training Program (STTP) on “Advanced Project and Scientific Paper Writing: Strategies for High-Impact Factor Journal Publication”, organized by the Department of Chemistry, Kishori Raman (PG) College, Madhura, UP, India and RSP Science Hub, Coimbatore, TN, India, 04 – 09 November 2024.

1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.

3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19

5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.

3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.

6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.

4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.

6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.
