## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.

## Ms. BHAGYALAXMI NAVADA
- M.Sc
- B.Sc
- Linar Algebra
- Graph Theory

## Journals
Published research article on “Strongly (Properly) Set Colorable Graphs” in Indian Journal of Natural Sciences
Vol.12 / Issue 65 / April / 2021

## Conference
1.Emerging trends in science and engineering 23 and 24 February 2017  held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.ADMA conference in Graph Theory from 8th June to 10th June 2017 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.
3. International conference on applied Mathematics and Civil structures  12 th February to 13th February 2021 held at SSN college of Engineering Chennai.

## FDP/Workshop Attended
1.Two day FDP on Applications of Statistical and neural network techniques in engineering from 6th June to 7th June 2016 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
2.Five day FDP on Research methodology and Enhancing teaching methodology  from  11th December to 15th December 2017 held at SMVITM Bantakal.
3 12 Weeks AICTE approved FDP on Discrete Mathematics from Jan 19 to April 19
4.Participated in STTP on Intellectual Property for Engineers and Scientists conducted by AICTE.09-11-2020 to 14-11-2020.
5.Participated in International web conference on signed graphs and Allied areas organised by Central University of Kerala on 07-12-2020 to 09-12-2020.
6.Five day online FDP on the theme “Inculcating Universal Human Values in Technical Education” organized by AICTE  from 10 May, 2021 to 14 May, 2021.
7. Attended AICTE FDP on the topic  Matrix Analysis with Applications from July-September.
